name: @borjie/inventory-management
description: Inventory management for estate organizations — SKU catalog, hierarchical stock locations, append-only stock movements (receipts/issues/transfers/adjustments), reorder + ABC analysis, cycle counts with variance handling, full asset lifecycle (install in unit → maintain → decommission) for appliances + security gadgets, barcode/QR lookup, and analytics (turnover, dead-stock, shrinkage). Pure functions + optional adapters for procurement-coordination and document-studio.
